blackbird_username.description: Search for a username or email across 600+ websites with optional AI behavioral profiling and PDF export.

sherlock_username.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks including Twitter, Instagram, GitHub, LinkedIn.

maigret_username.description: Deep username reconnaissance across 3000+ sites with profile parsing, recursive search, and detailed analysis.

phunter_phone_validate.description: Validate phone numbers and retrieve carrier metadata including line type (mobile, VoIP, etc.) and geographic location.

phunter_phone_amazon.description: Check if a phone number is linked to an Amazon account. Note: Limited API availability due to captcha requirements.

phunter_phone_person.description: Lookup owner/person information for a phone number. Full lookup available for French (+33) numbers via Page Blanche.

phunter_phone_batch.description: Upload a file of phone numbers (CSV/TXT) and receive aggregated validation results. Max 100 numbers per request.

theharvester_domain.description: Harvest emails, subdomains, hosts, and IPs from a target domain using Google, Bing, LinkedIn, Shodan, VirusTotal, and more.

homeharvest_address.description: Search for property listings by a specific address with normalization, validation, and optional radius search.

homeharvest_city.description: Search for property listings across an entire city with filtering by price, beds, baths, sqft, and property type.

homeharvest_advanced.description: Multi-criteria property search with comprehensive filtering: price, beds, baths, sqft, year built, lot size, property type, and agent contact filters.

zehef_email.description: Discover accounts and profiles linked to an email address across GitHub, Gravatar, Pinterest, Spotify, Duolingo, and Chess.com.

trestle_skip_trace.description: Premium skip tracing service. Provide email, phone, or full name to get comprehensive contact information.
trestle_skip_trace.note: At least one of email, phone, or full_name is required

responsePreview.message: MCP server is running with FastAPI integration

tools.name: encode_to_toon_format
tools.description:
Encode a Python data structure to TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) format.

TOON is optimized for LLM consumption with 30-60% fewer tokens than JSON.

tools.name: decode_from_toon_format
tools.description: Decode a TOON-formatted string back to Python data structure.

tools.name: compare_json_toon_formats
tools.description:
Compare JSON and TOON formats for the same data structure.

Shows token efficiency and format differences.

tools.name: get_toon_format_info
tools.description: Get information about TOON format and its benefits.

tools.name: unipile_status
tools.description: Get Unipile configuration and linked-account status for a Deal Scale user.

tools.name: unipile_accounts_list
tools.description: List Unipile accounts linked to a Deal Scale user.

tools.name: unipile_accounts_link
tools.description: Link a Unipile account ID to a Deal Scale user.

tools.name: unipile_accounts_unlink
tools.description: Remove a linked Unipile account mapping from a Deal Scale user.

tools.name: unipile_accounts_get_remote
tools.description: Get remote Unipile account details for a linked account.

tools.name: unipile_upstream_operations
tools.description: List backend-allowlisted Unipile upstream operations available through the secure proxy.

tools.name: unipile_upstream_call
tools.description: Execute a backend-allowlisted Unipile upstream operation with account ownership checks.

tools.name: unipile_chats_list
tools.description: List chats for a linked Unipile account.

tools.name: unipile_chats_start
tools.description: Start a Unipile chat and send the first message.

tools.name: unipile_messages_send
tools.description: Send a message to an existing Unipile chat.

tools.name: unipile_linkedin_relation_request
tools.description: Send a LinkedIn relation request through a linked Unipile account.

tools.name: compose_workflow
tools.description:
Compose a new workflow from sub-workflows and scripts.

This tool allows you to create custom workflows by combining
sub-workflows (audience_generation, campaign_creation, etc.) and
scripts (voice.qualifier, sms.nurture, email.intro).

tools.name: append_sub_workflow
tools.description:
Append a sub-workflow to an existing workflow.

This allows you to stack sub-workflows onto an existing workflow,
extending its functionality.

tools.name: append_script
tools.description:
Append a script phase to an existing workflow.

This allows you to add script-based phases (voice, SMS, email)
to an existing workflow.

tools.name: list_composed_workflows
tools.description:
List all composed workflows.

Returns information about all workflows that have been composed
using the workflow composer.

tools.name: get_workflow_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a composed workflow.

tools.name: list_available_sub_workflows
tools.description: List all available sub-workflows that can be used in composition.

tools.name: list_available_scripts
tools.description: List all available scripts that can be added to workflows.

tools.name: stack_workflows
tools.description:
Stack multiple sub-workflows onto a base workflow.

This is a convenience function that appends multiple sub-workflows
in sequence to an existing workflow.

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Perform a basic calculation operation.

resources.name: get_server_info
resources.description:
Returns server configuration information.

Args:
    ctx: Optional MCP context for logging
    
Returns:
    dict: Server information

prompts.name: dealscale_master_orchestrator_prompt
prompts.description:
DealScale MCP A2A Master Orchestrator Prompt

Master prompt for orchestrating look-alike audience generation, campaign creation,
enrichment, and multi-channel outreach using MCP + Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

This prompt defines:
- 8 specialized agents (DataEngineer, AudienceArchitect, CampaignOrchestrator, etc.)
- 7-phase master workflow (Ingest → Enrich → Audience → Campaign → Outreach → Feedback → Retrain)
- Sales scripts for voice, SMS, and email outreach
- Memory stores for persistent state
- A2A feedback channels for continuous improvement

Variables:
- tenantId, leadList, campaignName, location, propertyType
- ownerTimeInProperty, estimatedEquityPercentage, sellerIntentScore
- responseRate, skipTraceStatus, leadScore, contactStatus

Returns:
    POML-formatted prompt string

responsePreview.documentation: Check the FastMCP documentation for more details on how to use these endpoints.

Failed to analyze sentiment: 
Looks like you are missing some required data for this feature.

To download the necessary data, simply run

    python -m textblob.download_corpora

or use the NLTK downloader to download the missing data: http://nltk.org/data.html
If this doesn't fix the problem, file an issue at https://github.com/sloria/TextBlob/issues.
